title: delphinium coelesyriacum
intro: Delphinium coelesyriacum, also known as the Syrian Delphinium, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Delphinium coelesyriacum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, such as the common cold and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
